title: salix × angusensis
intro: Salix × angusensis, also known as the hybrid willow, is a cross between the white willow (Salix alba) and the goat willow (Salix caprea), resulting in a unique and versatile plant with various medicinal properties. The bark and leaves of Salix × angusensis contain salicylic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential applications in managing fever and digestive issues. Salix × angusensis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable addition to traditional medicine and natural health practices.
